allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection sip.telnyx.com -Port 5065 -InformationLevel Quiet; Test-NetConnection sip.telnyx.com -Port 443 -InformationLevel Quiet; Test-NetConnection sip.telnyx.com -Port 8089 -InformationLevel Quiet")

Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection sip.telnyx.com -Port 5065 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TcpTestSucceeded; Test-NetConnection sip.telnyx.com -Port 443 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TcpTestSucceeded")
